ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure storage */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., participant, researcher, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stress_management_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant providing the response */,
  "stress_practice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stress management practice */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency category */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was recorded */,
  "response_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the response (e.g., comments, ratings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stress_management_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stress_management_responses_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequency_categories ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stress_management_responses_stress_practice_id FOREIGN KEY ("stress_practice_id") REFERENCES stress_practices ("practice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stress_practices" (
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stress management practice */,
  "practice_name" TEXT /* Name of the stress management practice */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the practice */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the practice (e.g., physical, mental, relaxation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequency_categories" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency category */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., Didn't Take, A Few Days Per Month) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what this frequency implies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group classification (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the participant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the participant */,
  "relationship_status" TEXT /* Relationship status of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey result entry */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency category */,
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stress practice */,
  "number_of_responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses for this combination */,
  "cumulative_percentage" REAL /* Cumulative percentage of responses */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by participants for this practice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequency_categories ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_practice_id FOREIGN KEY ("practice_id") REFERENCES stress_practices ("practice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Description of the data viewed or accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_management_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date of report creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
